ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
Orange jelly (45%) (Sugar, Glucose-fructose Syrup, Water, Humectant: Glycerol, Gelling Agent: Pectins, Orange juice Concentrate (0.5%), Apple juice Concentrate, Acidity Regulators: Citric Acid, Sodium Citrates, Flavour, Colour: Annatto).
Gluten Free Sponge Biscuit (40%) (Maize Flour, Egg, Sugar, Water, Potato Starch, Soya Flour, Glucose-fructose Syrup, Maltodextrin, Vegetable Oil (Rapeseed), Raising Agents: Ammonium Carbonates, Sodium Phosphates, Sodium Carbonates, Salt).
Chocolate Coating (15%) (Sugar, Cocoa Mass, Cocoa Butter; Emulsifiers: Soya Lecithins, E476, Flavour).
